verified.notes: Query requests data for 'Medicare Savings Programs (QMB, SLMB, QI)' collectively. Alaska state agency source provides 2026 income limits effective 04/01/2026 ($2,265/month single; $6,064/month couples) but does not specify which program(s) these apply to or provide asset limits. Federal sources (Medicare.gov, CMS, SSA) show QMB has asset limits ($9,430 individual, $14,130 couple as of 2026 per SelectQuote source), but Alaska-specific asset limits and phone number for Alaska applications could not be located in provided search results. No age requirement applies to these programs. Recommend contacting Alaska Department of Health or state Medicaid agency directly for complete Alaska-specific details and application phone number.
